name: Hello Dolly Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 13x9-inch pan.
2. Spread graham cracker crumbs evenly over the bottom of the pan.
3. Spread chocolate chips in a layer over the crumbs.
4. Spread pecans in a layer over the chocolate chips.
5. Pour condensed milk over everything.
6. Do not stir at any time.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Cool, then cut into squares.
